deck:
* Phase-Shifted Half Bridge (PSHB) — three-level Pinheiro-Barbi NPC
* Vin=48V (primary swings +Vin/2 / 0 / -Vin/2 via 3-level NPC), Vo=12V, Fs=100kHz, Deff=0.7, outputs=1
* n=1.21, Lr=0.750212uH, Lm=247.356uH, Lo=64.1176uH, rect=2
* Bridge: single 3-level NPC leg (4 stacked S-switches + 2 NPC clamp diodes
* + per-switch RC snubbers). Same modeling approach as DAB/PSFB (real S-switches
* with PWM gates and DIDEAL antiparallel body diodes). DC1/DC2 anchor the inner
* nodes to mid_cap (Vin/2) during the freewheel intervals when only one inner
* switch conducts. Transformer primary connects between point 'a' (leg midpoint)
* and 'b' (split-cap midpoint), so vab swings +Vin/2 / 0 / -Vin/2 / 0.
* Reference: Pinheiro & Barbi, IEEE TPE 8(4) 1993; Barbi & Pottker, Springer 2018.

.model DIDEAL D(IS=1e-12 RS=0.005 CJO=1n BV=1000 IBV=1e-12)
.model SW1 SW VT=2.5 VH=0.8 RON=0.01 ROFF=1e+06

Vdc vin_dc 0 48

C_split_hi vin_dc mid_cap 470u ic=24
C_split_lo mid_cap 0 470u ic=24

Vpwm_S1 pwm_S1 0 PULSE(0 5 0.000000e+00 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 3.500000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_S2 pwm_S2 0 PULSE(0 5 0.000000e+00 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 5.000000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_S3 pwm_S3 0 PULSE(0 5 5.000000e-06 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 5.000000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_S4 pwm_S4 0 PULSE(0 5 5.000000e-06 2.000000e-07 2.000000e-07 3.500000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vq1_sense vin_dc qa_drain 0
S1 qa_drain nH pwm_S1 0 SW1
S2 nH bridge_a pwm_S2 0 SW1
S3 bridge_a nL pwm_S3 0 SW1
S4 nL 0 pwm_S4 0 SW1
DC1 mid_cap nH DIDEAL
DC2 nL mid_cap DIDEAL

Vpri_sense bridge_a pri_lr 0
Evab vab 0 bridge_a mid_cap 1

L_series pri_lr trafo_pri 7.502116e-07 IC=4.132231e-01

L_pri trafo_pri mid_cap 2.473557e-04
L_sec_o1 sec_a_o1 sec_b_o1 1.689473e-04
K1 L_pri L_sec_o1 9.999000e-01

Evpri_w vpri_w 0 trafo_pri mid_cap 1
Evsec_w_o1 vsec_w_o1 0 sec_a_o1 sec_b_o1 1

Vsec1_sense_o1 sec_a_o1 rec_a_o1 0
Vsec2_sense_o1 sec_b_o1 rec_b_o1 0
D_r1_o1 rec_a_o1 out_rect_o1 DIDEAL
D_r2_o1 rec_b_o1 out_rect_o1 DIDEAL
D_r3_o1 out_gnd_o1 rec_a_o1 DIDEAL
D_r4_o1 out_gnd_o1 rec_b_o1 DIDEAL
L_out_o1 out_rect_o1 out_node_o1 6.411765e-05 IC=2.000000e+00
C_out_o1 out_node_o1 out_gnd_o1 1.000000e-04 IC=1.200000e+01
R_load_o1 out_node_o1 out_gnd_o1 6.000000
Vout_sense_o1 out_gnd_o1 0 0

.tran 5.000000e-08 2.401000e-02 2.400000e-02

.save v(vin_dc) v(vab) v(bridge_a) v(mid_cap) v(nH) v(nL) v(vpri_w) i(Vpri_sense) i(Vdc) i(Vq1_sense) v(out_node_o1) v(vsec_w_o1) i(Vsec1_sense_o1) i(Vsec2_sense_o1) i(Vout_sense_o1)

.options RELTOL=1.000000e-02 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=500
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000e+00
.ic v(mid_cap)=2.400000e+01 v(out_node_o1)=1.200000e+01
.nodeset v(rec_a_o1)=1.270000e+01 v(rec_b_o1)=1.270000e+01 v(out_rect_o1)=1.200000e+01 v(sec_a_o1)=1.270000e+01 v(sec_b_o1)=1.270000e+01

.end
